name: wakkinen-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace — custom skills and tools

plugins.name: e2e-test-playwright
plugins.description: Comprehensive E2E browser testing skill leveraging Playwright and superpowers. CLI mode (default, lower tokens) with MCP fallback.

plugins.name: e2e-test-agent-browser
plugins.description: E2E browser testing using Vercel's agent-browser CLI (native Rust). Faster than Playwright, no Node.js runtime needed. Uses superpowers for planning and verification.

plugins.name: mission-control-hooks
plugins.description: Claude Code session registration hooks for Mission Control dashboard. Registers on SessionStart, deregisters on Stop. No skills — hooks only.
